chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Making up the Night Prayer

text: 1425 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «كُلُّ مَا فَاتَكَ بِاللَّيْلِ فَاقْضِهِ بِالنَّهَارِ قَالَ اَللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى: «وَ هُوَ اَلَّذِي جَعَلَ اَللَّيْلَ وَ اَلنَّهٰارَ خِلْفَةً لِمَنْ أَرٰادَ أَنْ يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرٰادَ شُكُوراً » »

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1425 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whatever you miss during the night, make it up during the day, as Allah (swt) the Exalted said: 'And it is He who made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude.'”.
